text_block_list.text:
The Yayoi Sho, Matikanefukukitaru's<n>"Dragon
Gate" and our spring hurdle<n>to the Classics, is
upon us.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Determined to soar through the race<n>like a carp
swimming up a waterfall<n>and show everyone her
transformation into a fearsome<n>classic-year racer,
Matikanefukukitaru heads to the<n>track.
